title: pelargonium × tanacetifolium
intro: Pelargonium × tanacetifolium, also known as Mountain Geranium or Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pelargonium × tanacetifolium include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have a positive impact on cardiovascular health and immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
